holdings.infoBox: DVDN is an equity ETF with a total of 18 individual holdings. The top holdings are Trinity Capital stock at 7.41%, Annaly Capital Management at 6.35%, Adamas Trust at 6.32%, Invesco Mortgage Capital at 6.23%, and AGNC Investment at 6.09%.

overview.description: The Kingsbarn Dividend Opportunity ETF (DVDN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in real estate equity. The fund is an actively managed, narrow portfolio of publicly traded equities issued by residential and commercial mortgage REITs or business development companies. The funds objective is to provide quarterly dividends and long-term capital appreciation. DVDN was launched on Nov 2, 2023 and is issued by Kingsbarn.
